events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Nottingham Forest

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest thumped Brighton & Hove Albion 7-0 helped by a hat trick from striker Chris Wood in their Premier League clash at the City Ground on Saturday in an emphatic bounce back from last week's humbling 5-0 loss at Bournemouth.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wood hits hat trick as Forest put 7 past Brighton

headlines.description: Liverpool opened up a nine-point lead in the Premier League title race as Mohamed Salah continued his sensational season with both goals in a 2-0 win at Bournemouth on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah strikes see Liverpool go 9 points clear

headlines.description: Abdoulaye Doucoure scored the fastest goal of the season in Everton's 4-0 win over Leicester City on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton's fast start sees them thrash Leicester

headlines.description: Southampton earned their second Premier League win of the season after Paul Onuachu struck late to earn his side at 2-1 at Ipswich Town.
headlines.shortLinkText: Southampton beat Ipswich for 2nd win of season

headlines.description: Fulham substitute Rodrigo Muniz struck in the 82nd minute to give his side a 2-1 Premier League away win over Newcastle United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Muniz nets late winner as Fulham beat Newcastle

headlines.description: Struggling Wolves stunned high-flying rivals Aston Villa 2-0 on Saturday to end a run of four straight defeats and move out of the relegation zone.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves move out of drop zone with win over Villa
